ext_weather.name: Today
ext_weather.detailedForecast: Areas of fog and a chance of rain showers before 11am, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 68, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
